windows.description_detailed: Handling red dye chunks. Adding colour (dye chips, liquid dye, crayon) to the melted wax and stirring until uniform. process phase, ~12% in, 1:12–1:20. Terminology: candle dye.

windows.description_detailed: Hands at the star bowl. Preparing the vessel - cleaning the jar and fixing the wick to the base with a glue dot / wick sticker, then centering it. prep phase, ~15% in, 1:28–1:36. Terminology: wick priming.
